title: Two-finger scrolling
drDigitalIntro:
Scrolling lets you see more of a page.
• Put two fingers on the trackpad and slide up or down.
• Scroll down in the browser to find a secret code.
• Then scroll back up and type the code in the box.

playgroundTask.instructions: Scroll down using two fingers to find the code, then scroll back up and type it into the box.

drDigitalSuccess: You found it and scrolled right back! Two-finger scrolling is officially yours.
drDigitalHint: Slide two fingers down on the trackpad to scroll down inside the page below. Once you find the code, slide two fingers up to scroll back to the top, then type the code in the box.
